tweets.text: last 2 days were such a blast! met @Ritualist_Indo community in Bandung i cherish every moment there, vibing with ritual community on the way, eating together, sharing insight and alpha, playing games together, everything! my home isnt actually in Bandung. but i thought it was a good time to visit for a while, and i can say it was worth it! i hope there will be another meetup soon ahahahah @ritualnet @ritualfnd
